name: on frFrameError
title: on frFrameError
description: The event procedure is called if an erroneous frame is received in the specified slot and cycle.
If two erroneous frames are received in the corresponding slot (on channel A and on B), then the event procedure is called twice (once for each frame).
An optional channel parameter for event filtering can be assigned to all handlers:
In this example, the event procedure is only called for erroneous frames whose application channel is 2 and its ID is 5.
An optional qualifier can be used to assign the handler to a specific network:
In this example, the event procedure is only called for erroneous frames from the application channel that is named "network" in the Simulation Setup (only available for CANoe).

parameters.description: Specifies the default procedure. This procedure is called for all received erroneous frames for which there is no explicit event procedure.

description: The following program reacts on frame errors and prints them in the Write Window.
